name: needle
description: Embedded vector database (SQLite for vectors) with HNSW search, hybrid BM25+vector retrieval, metadata filtering, and collection snapshots. Create, search, and manage vector collections directly from AI agents.
author: Anthropic

tools.name: list_collections
tools.description: List all vector collections in the database with their dimensions and vector counts

tools.name: create_collection
tools.description: Create a new vector collection with specified dimensions and distance function

tools.name: collection_info
tools.description: Get detailed statistics about a collection including memory usage

tools.name: insert_vectors
tools.description: Insert one or more vectors with optional JSON metadata

tools.name: search
tools.description: Search for similar vectors using ANN with optional MongoDB-style metadata filters

tools.name: get_vector
tools.description: Retrieve a specific vector and its metadata by ID

tools.name: delete_vector
tools.description: Delete a vector from a collection by ID

tools.name: delete_collection
tools.description: Delete an entire collection and all its vectors
